channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner
channel.description: High-signal SEC EDGAR filings — tender offers, going-private, activist stakes, spinoffs, delistings, busted deals.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · DSVSF
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Glencore's Kidd Operations for $10M shares + offtake + royalty
item.description:
Acquires Glencore's Kidd Operations for $10M shares + offtake + royalty

Discovery Silver Corp. announced the acquisition of Glencore's Kidd Operations in Timmins, Ontario, including the Kidd Creek Mine and Kidd Met Site. Consideration includes $10 million in Discovery common shares, offtake arrangements, and a 1% NSR royalty, plus a potential deferred payment of up to $75 million contingent on permits. Closing is expected in the first half of 2026, subject to regulatory approvals, TSX approval, and other conditions.

About: Discovery Silver Corp., a mineral exploration company, engages in the exploration and development of polymetallic deposits. The company's flagship property is the Cordero silver project, which covers an area of approximately 35,000 hectares located in the Chihuahua state, Mexico. It also holds option agreement to purchase 100% interest in the Puerto Rico, La Kika, Minerva, Monclova, and Santa Rosa projects in Mexico. The company was formerly known as Discovery Metals Corp.

  • Counterparty: Glencore
  • Deal value: $10M shares + contingent $75M
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-03-02
  • Expected Close: H1 2026

item.title: 🧬 Spin-Off · NVRI
item.ns0:headline: Spun off New Enviri; Clean Earth sold to Veolia for $3.04B
item.description:
Spun off New Enviri; Clean Earth sold to Veolia for $3.04B

Completed the spin-off of its Harsco Environmental and Rail businesses as New Enviri (NVRI) and the sale of its Clean Earth business to Veolia for $3.04 billion. Former Enviri shareholders received $15 cash per CLEH share plus 1/3 share of New Enviri per CLEH share. New Enviri begins trading June 2 under NVRI.

About: Enviri Corporation provides environmental solutions for industrial and specialty waste streams in the United States and internationally. The company operates through two segments: Harsco Environmental and Harsco Clean Earth. The Harsco Environmental segment offers on-site services under long-term contracts for material logistics, product quality improvement, and resource recovery for iron, steel, and metals manufacturing; manufactures and sells industrial abrasives, roofing granules, aluminum dr…

  • Deal value: $3,040,000,000
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2025-11-20
  • Expected Close: 2026-06-01

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · LIQT
item.ns0:headline: Restructures $6M notes: $3M converted to stock, $3M cash
item.description:
Restructures $6M notes: $3M converted to stock, $3M cash

Entered into a Debt Cancellation Agreement with note holders (Bleichroeder L.P. affiliates and 21 April Fund) to cancel $6M senior promissory notes. Under the agreement, $3M of notes will be converted into common stock at the public offering price and $3M will be paid in cash plus accrued interest, contingent on the closing of the company's underwritten public offering (S-1 filed May 27, 2026). After closing, the notes will be extinguished and note holders receive resale registration rights.

About: LiqTech International, Inc., a clean technology company, designs, develops, produces, markets, and sells automated filtering systems, ceramic silicon carbide liquid applications, and diesel particulate air filters in the United States, Canada, Europe, Asia, and South America. It operates in three segments: Water, Ceramics, and Plastics.

  • Counterparty: Bleichroeder L.P. affiliates and 21 April Fund
  • Deal value: $6M
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-05-26
  • Expected Close: upon closing of public offering (S-1 filed May 27, 2026)

The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in New York, New York.

item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Public Storage for $10.5B; close 3Q26
item.description:
Acquired by Public Storage for $10.5B; close 3Q26

Is being acquired by Public Storage in a $10.5 billion strategic combination. The deal is expected to close in 3Q26, with $110-130M of actionable synergies to be realized over 3+ years. The combined entity will have 4,596 properties and 328 million square feet.

About: National Storage Affiliates Trust is a Maryland real estate investment trust focused on the ownership, operation and acquisition of self storage properties located within the top 100 metropolitan statistical areas throughout the United States. As of September 30, 2020, the Company held ownership interests in and operated 788 self storage properties located in 35 states and Puerto Rico with approximately 49.5 million rentable square feet.

item.ns0:headline: Merges with OpenPayd in $800M stock-for-stock deal; vote pending
item.description:
Merges with OpenPayd in $800M stock-for-stock deal; vote pending

Entered into a business combination agreement to merge with OpenPayd Holdings Limited, valuing the combined entity at $800 million. Titan shareholders will receive one PubCo ordinary share per Titan share, with a redemption option for cash from the trust. The transaction requires shareholder approval and regulatory clearances, with a target closing by December 31, 2026.

About: Titan Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 11, 2024 and is headquartered in Brooklyn, NY.

  • Counterparty: OpenPayd Holdings Limited
  • Deal value: $800,000,000
  • Consideration: stock

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · PCRX
item.ns0:headline: Faces proxy contest from DOMA Perpetual; ISS recommends FOR management slate
item.description:
Faces proxy contest from DOMA Perpetual; ISS recommends FOR management slate

Faces a proxy contest from DOMA Perpetual Capital Management, which has nominated three director candidates for election at the June 9, 2026 annual meeting. ISS recommends voting FOR Pacira's three nominees (Christie, Hirawat, Wiggans) and AGAINST all DOMA nominees, citing the board's proactive strategy and lack of compelling case for change.

About: Pacira BioSciences, Inc. provides non-opioid pain management and regenerative health solutions for healthcare practitioners and their patients in the United States. The company offers EXPAREL, a bupivacaine liposome injectable suspension; ZILRETTA, a triamcinolone acetonide extended-release injectable suspension; and iovera system, a non-opioid handheld cryoanalgesia device used to produce controlled doses of cold temperature only to targeted nerves.

  • Counterparty: DOMA Perpetual Capital Management LLC

item.description:
Sells Dallas property to Arena Development for $50.8M; option exercise pending

Entered into an option purchase and sale agreement to sell a Dallas, Texas property to Arena Development Intermediate, LLC for $50,760,000. The buyer made an initial option payment of $169,200 and will make monthly payments until the option is exercised or expires. Closing is expected by January 31, 2028, subject to buyer obtaining entitlements and exercising the option.

About: Seritage Growth Properties is a publicly-traded, self-administered and self-managed REIT with 166 wholly-owned properties and 29 unconsolidated properties totaling approximately 30.4 million square feet of space across 44 states and Puerto Rico. The Company was formed to unlock the underlying real estate value of a high-quality retail portfolio it acquired from Sears Holdings in July 2015.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · BURU
item.ns0:headline: Acquires 70% of Tekne for €34.9M cash + earn-out; GP approval needed
item.description:
Acquires 70% of Tekne for €34.9M cash + earn-out; GP approval needed

Entered an investment agreement to acquire a 70% equity interest in Tekne S.p.A. for total consideration of approximately €34.9 million in cash at closing (including a subscription price of €29.7 million and a stock purchase of €5.2 million) plus an earn-out of up to €29.7 million based on Tekne's revenues from 2027-2036. The transaction is subject to Italian Golden Power regulatory approval by September 30, 2026, with closing within 30 days of approval.

About: Nuburu, Inc. develops high power precision blue light engine lasers for the metal processing and 3D printing industries worldwide. The company offers Nuburu AO and NUBURU BL series lasers. Its products have applications in battery, e-mobility, consumer electronics, and 3D printing metal systems. Nuburu, Inc. is headquartered in Centennial, Colorado.

  • Counterparty: Tekne S.p.A.
  • Deal value: €34.9M cash + earn-out up to €29.7M
  • Stake: 70%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-05-26
  • Expected Close: Pending GP approval by Sep 30, 2026; close within 30 days thereafter

item.ns0:headline: Closes recapitalization with BAT; debenture converted, equity invested
item.description:
Closes recapitalization with BAT; debenture converted, equity invested

Closed the previously announced transaction with BAT, converting the C$75.3M convertible debenture and making a concurrent equity investment that gives BAT control of the company. Shareholders approved the transaction at the May 28, 2026 annual meeting, and BAT designee James Raborn joined the board. The company remains publicly traded on TSX and OTCQX.

About: Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. engages in farming, manufacturing, marketing, and selling hemp-derived cannabidiol (CBD) wellness products. The company's products categories include hemp extract oil tinctures, such as liquid products; gummies comprising sleep, stress, immunity, and exercise recovery products; and capsules, CBD topical creams, and lotions, as well as products for pets under the Charlotte's Web, CBD Medic, CBD Clinic, and Harmony Hemp brands.

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · SEER
item.ns0:headline: Faces proxy contest from Radoff-JEC Group; 3 nominees, $2.35/share buyout proposal
item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Radoff-JEC Group; 3 nominees, $2.35/share buyout proposal

Faces a proxy contest from the Radoff-JEC Group (7.8% owner), which is nominating three directors (Howard H. Berman, Joshua S. Horowitz, Luis E. Rinaldini) for election at the 2026 Annual Meeting. The group also submitted a non-binding proposal to acquire Seer for $2.35 per share in cash plus a contingent value right representing 80% of net proceeds from future asset sales, a 39% premium to the unaffected price. The board has not responded to the proposal; the annual meeting date is to be determined.

About: Seer, Inc., a life sciences company, engages in developing and commercializing products to decode the secrets of the proteome. It develops Proteograph Product Suite, an integrated solution that comprises consumables, an automation instrumentation, and software that allows researchers to conduct proteomic studies in therapeutic and diagnostic research, and clinical trials.

  • Counterparty: Radoff-JEC Group
  • Offer price: $2.35 per share
  • Premium: 39%
  • Stake: 7.8%
  • Consideration: cash+CVR
  • Announced: 2026-04-24

item.title: 🧭 Domicile · XPRO
item.ns0:headline: Redomiciling to Cayman Islands; vote June 10
item.description:
Redomiciling to Cayman Islands; vote June 10

Group Holdings N.V. (Expro Ltd) proposes to migrate its legal domicile from the Netherlands to the Cayman Islands on a one-for-one share exchange, with no change to economic interests, NYSE listing (XPRO), or governance structure. The board unanimously recommends approval, requiring a two-thirds vote at the June 10, 2026 annual general meeting. Benefits include over $1M annual savings, avoidance of EU CSRD costs, elimination of Dutch withholding tax on dividends/repurchases, and improved index eligibility.

item.ns0:headline: Sells $245M of assets; exits Bismarck, Rapid City markets
item.description:
Sells $245M of assets; exits Bismarck, Rapid City markets

Announced a portfolio optimization plan to sell approximately $240-245 million of assets in 2026, including twelve communities and a full exit from the Bismarck and Rapid City markets plus one Denver property. Proceeds will reduce total debt by $175-190 million, improving leverage from 8.2x to sub-7x Annualized Net Debt to EBITDA. All dispositions are under contract and expected to close in the second half of 2026.

Founded in 1970, as of June 30, 2021, Centerspace owned 62 apartment communities consisting of 11,579 apartment homes located in Colorado, Minnesota, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, and South Dakota. Centerspace was named a Top Workplace for 2021 by the Minneapolis Star Tribune. For more information, please visit www.centerspacehomes.com.

item.ns0:headline: Debt exchange: $150M term loan + $39M preferred + $31.4M cash
item.description:
Debt exchange: $150M term loan + $39M preferred + $31.4M cash

Subsidiaries entered into an exchange agreement with all existing term and revolving lenders to replace all outstanding debt with a new $150M term loan due Jan 2031, 39,250 Series A convertible preferred shares (stated value $39.3M), and a $31.4M cash payment. The preferred shares carry a 7% cumulative dividend, convert at $10.40 per common share (27.4% of equity on as-converted basis), and grant lenders a board seat if at least 50% remain outstanding. The exchange also settles pending litigation and is subject to customary conditions.

It serves customers in the areas of health, subscription, finance, insurance, business and technology, travel, auto, and other direct-to-consumer businesses. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Los Angeles, California.

item.description:

Announced the U.S. District Court for the District of Idaho denied a motion for preliminary injunction filed by environmental groups seeking to block construction of its Stibnite Gold Project. The court also granted in part the company's motion to strike certain materials. Following the ruling, Perpetua commenced additional critical path construction activities including road upgrades, worker housing, powerline work, and exploration drilling.

About: Perpetua Resources Corp. engages in the mineral exploration activities in the United States. The company primarily explores for gold, silver, and antimony. Its principal asset is the 100% owned Stibnite gold project located in Valley County, Idaho. The company was formerly known as Midas Gold Corp. and changed its name to Perpetua Resources Corp. in February 2021. Perpetua Resources Corp. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Boise, Idaho.

  • Announced: 2026-06-01

Verano Holdings Corp. announced board approval and plans to seek shareholder approval for a continuance from British Columbia, Canada, to the State of Nevada. Upon completion, subordinate voting shares will exchange 1:1 for Nevada common stock, and the stock will continue trading under the same ticker on Cboe Canada and OTCQX. A preliminary proxy statement was filed on September 12, 2025, and a special meeting of shareholders will be called to vote on the arrangement.

About: Verano Holdings Corp. operates as a vertically integrated multi-state cannabis operator in the United States. The company engages in the cultivation, processing, wholesale, and retail distribution of cannabis in Arizona, Connecticut, Florida, Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Nevada, New Jersey, Ohio, Virginia and West Virginia, and Pennsylvania. It offers cannabis products under the Encore, Avexia, MUV, Savvy, BITS, Verano, and Essence brands for medical and adult-use markets.

item.ns0:headline: Spins off 80.1% of FedEx Freight to shareholders; now public
item.description:
Spins off 80.1% of FedEx Freight to shareholders; now public

Corporation completed the spin-off of its freight subsidiary, FedEx Freight Holding Company, by distributing 80.1% of FedEx Freight shares to FedEx stockholders on June 1, 2026. The distribution was made on a pro-rata basis, and FedEx Freight will operate as an independent publicly traded company. The separation was effectuated through a separation and distribution agreement and ancillary transition services, tax, employee, and IP agreements.

About: FedEx Corporation provides transportation, e-commerce, and business services in the United States and internationally. The company's FedEx Express segment offers express transportation, small-package ground delivery, and freight transportation services; time-critical transportation services; and cross-border enablement, technology, and e-commerce transportation solutions. Its FedEx Ground segment provides day-certain delivery services to businesses and residences.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Lost · OCS
item.ns0:headline: Phase 3 DIAMOND trials miss primary endpoint; discontinues DME program
item.description:
Phase 3 DIAMOND trials miss primary endpoint; discontinues DME program

Oculis announced topline results from its DIAMOND Phase 3 trials of OCS-01 in diabetic macular edema. The primary endpoint of mean change in BCVA at week 52 was not met in both trials; retinal thickness showed substantial reduction but did not translate into visual gain. Company does not plan to pursue FDA filing for OCS-01 in DME and will focus resources on Privosegtor and Licaminlimab programs. Cash position remains strong at $278M as of March 31, 2026.

About: Oculis Holding AG, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops novel topical treatments for ophthalmic diseases for both back- and front-of-the-eye. The company's lead candidate is OCS-01, a topical dexamethasone formulation, which is in Phase 3 clinical trials for the treatment of diabetic macular edema; OCS-02, a topical biologic candidate that is in Phase 2b clinical trials for the treatment for keratoconjunctivitis sicca, or dry eye disease; and OCS-05, a novel neuroprotective agent…

  • Announced: 2026-05-29

item.description:

America's Car-Mart announced its Board has retained Houlihan Lokey as financial advisor to evaluate strategic alternatives, including financing, recapitalization, mergers and acquisitions, and other transactions. A Special Committee was formed to oversee the review, chaired by newly appointed independent director Adam Paul. No specific transaction has been announced.

The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Rogers, Arkansas.

item.description:

Is merging with Armada Acquisition Corp. II (SPAC) and acquiring Pathfinder Digital Assets LLC. Under the Business Combination Agreement dated October 19, 2025, SPAC shareholders receive one Pubco Class A share per SPAC share, and Pathfinder unit holders receive one Pubco Class A share per unit. The transaction values the combined entity at $230M assuming a $10.00 per share price. Concurrent PIPE investments total $214.05M cash plus 600,000 XRP from Advance Funding Subscribers, $10.5M cash plus 200,000 XRP from Delayed Funding Subscribers, and additional XRP contributions from Ripple and the Sponsor. The filing is a proxy statement for the extraordinary general meeting of Armada shareholders to approve the deal.

Diana already owns 14.4% of Genco and has secured $1.433 billion in bank financing for the acquisition.

item.ns0:headline: Settles with Elliott; Cohn joins board, standstill at 4.9% ownership
item.description:
Settles with Elliott; Cohn joins board, standstill at 4.9% ownership

Entered a cooperation agreement with Elliott Investment Management L.P. Elliott's Jesse Cohn will join the board as an independent director effective June 1, 2026. The agreement includes voting commitments, standstill restrictions limiting Elliott to 4.9% beneficial ownership and 7.5% aggregate economic exposure, and mutual non-disparagement provisions. The cooperation period lasts until one year after the agreement or 10 days after Cohn leaves the board.

item.description:

Won its FDA Formal Dispute Resolution appeal; the FDA concluded substantial evidence of effectiveness for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA for neovascular age-related macular degeneration. The company expects to resubmit the BLA in June 2026 as a Class 1 resubmission with a PDUFA decision within 60 days. If approved, ONS-5010 would be the first FDA-approved ophthalmic formulation of bevacizumab.

item.description:
Acquired by GMIN for 0.212 GMIN shares + 0.5 G3 shares per G2 share; vote June 16

G2 Goldfields shareholders will receive 0.212 GMIN shares and 0.5 G3 shares per G2 share in a plan of arrangement with G Mining Ventures, representing a 72% premium based on 30-day VWAP. The special meeting to approve the arrangement is scheduled for June 16, 2026, with closing expected in early July. The board unanimously recommends voting FOR the arrangement.

About: G2 Goldfields Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of gold deposits in Guiana. It primarily holds 100% interests in the properties located in the Oko Aremu District and Puruni District, Guyana. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Lost · RYES
item.ns0:headline: Lost summary judgment in Clean Water Act suit; reviewing options
item.description:
Lost summary judgment in Clean Water Act suit; reviewing options

Rise Gold Corp.'s subsidiary lost summary judgment in a Clean Water Act suit brought by Community Environmental Advocates. The court ruled that Rise is responsible for pollutants entering a local creek without a permit. Rise disputes the ruling and is reviewing its options, including a potential appeal.

About: Rise Gold Corp. explores for mineral properties in the United States. It primarily holds a 100% interest in the Idaho-Maryland Gold Mine property that comprises approximately 175 acres surface land and approximately 2,800 acres of mineral rights located in the Grass Valley mining district of northern California. The company was formerly known as Rise Resources Inc. and changed its name to Rise Gold Corp. in April 2017. Rise Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.

  • Counterparty: Community Environmental Advocates (CEA)

AFD will own approximately 52% of the outstanding Class A common stock post-closing. Founder Jonah Peretti resigns as CEO and Chairman; Byron Allen Folks appointed CEO and Chairman. item.ns0:headline: Spins out Courageous Lake into Valor Gold; 1:1.957 ratio; close June 3
item.description:
Spins out Courageous Lake into Valor Gold; 1:1.957 ratio; close June 3

Seabridge Gold's shareholders approved the spin-out of the Courageous Lake gold project into Valor Gold Corp. via a plan of arrangement, with 99.76% voting in favor. Under the arrangement, Seabridge shareholders will receive one Valor share for every approximately 1.957 Seabridge shares held. The transaction is subject to final court approval on May 27, 2026, and is expected to close on or about June 3, 2026, after which Valor shares will list on TSX and OTCQB.

About: Seabridge Gold Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition and exploration of gold properties in North America. The company also explores for copper, silver, molybdenum, and rhenium deposits. item.ns0:headline: EC approves Joenja for APDS; first EU launch Q3 2026
item.description:
EC approves Joenja for APDS; first EU launch Q3 2026

Announced that the European Commission granted marketing authorization for Joenja (leniolisib) for the treatment of activated PI3Kδ syndrome (APDS) in patients aged 12 and older. This is the first approved treatment for APDS in the European Union, with the first launch expected in Germany in Q3 2026. The approval is based on a Phase II/III trial showing statistically significant improvements in immune dysregulation markers.

About: Pharming Group N.V., a biopharmaceutical company, develops and commercialize protein replacement therapies and precision medicines for the treatment of rare diseases and unmet medical needs in the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company's lead product is Ruconest, a recombinant human C1 esterase inhibitor that is used for the treatment of acute hereditary angioedema.

item.description:
Seeks removal of Chair Donna James at June 11 AGM

BBRC International, a 13% stockholder of Victoria's Secret & Co., issued a statement urging stockholders to vote against Chair Donna James at the June 11 annual meeting. BBRC criticizes James's 25-year tenure, citing poor oversight, failed acquisitions, and financial underperformance, and argues a new chair is needed to protect the ongoing turnaround.

The company offers bras, panties, lingerie, sleepwear, loungewear, and athletic attire and swimwear, as well as fragrances and body care products, and accessories under the Victoria's Secret and PINK brands. As of March 2, 2022, it operated approximately 1,400 retail stores. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Reynoldsburg, Ohio.

item.ns0:headline: Fined RMB308.1M by CSRC for illegal cross-border securities business
item.description:
Fined RMB308.1M by CSRC for illegal cross-border securities business

Limited (TIGR) received administrative penalties from the CSRC Beijing Bureau totaling approximately RMB308.1 million, plus confiscation of illegal income of approximately RMB103.1 million, for unlicensed cross-border securities, fund, and futures business in mainland China. CEO Tianhua Wu was also fined RMB1.25 million. Retail client assets in mainland China represent about 10% of total client assets as of end-2025. The company accepts the penalty and will implement rectification measures.

About: UP Fintech Holding Limited provides online brokerage services focusing on Chinese investors. The company has developed a brokerage platform, which allows investor to trade stocks, options, warrants, and other financial instruments that can be accessed through its APP and website. It offers brokerage and value-added services, including investor education, community engagement, and IR platform; and account management services.

  • Announced: 2026-05-22

item.ns0:headline: Calls special meeting to elect board majority; urges dual-track sale/lease process
item.description:
Calls special meeting to elect board majority; urges dual-track sale/lease process

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., delivered a shareholder presentation calling for a special meeting to elect a new board majority. He argues the board must run a dual-track process to explore a sale or lease of the company's Project Matador assets, citing risks of dilution, financing, and counterparty exposure. Neugebauer states he is not seeking the CEO role and wants an independent committee to maximize risk-adjusted value for all shareholders.

About: Fermi, Inc. engages in the development of energy infrastructure. It intends to develop an energy and data center development campus to support the needs of to-be-built AI infrastructure. The company was founded by Rick Perry, Toby Neugebauer and Griffin Perry on January 10, 2025 and is headquartered in Amrillo, TX.

Pacific Booker Minerals Inc. was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

item.ns0:headline: Sells Global Knowledge Training to EHJob GP for up to $18M; close Q2
item.description:
Sells Global Knowledge Training to EHJob GP for up to $18M; close Q2

Entered into a definitive agreement to sell its Global Knowledge Training business (instructor-led training) to EHJob GP LLC for total consideration of up to $18 million, consisting of $10 million initial cash at closing (subject to working capital adjustments) plus $10 million deferred consideration less approximately $2 million for long-term employee liabilities, payable in five quarterly installments. The initial payment may be funded by a seller note from the business to Skillsoft. Skillsoft intends to use net proceeds for general corporate purposes and to focus on its core AI-native skills management platform. The transaction is subject to customary closing conditions, including Saudi Arabia competition clearance, and is expected to close in the second fiscal quarter (by July 31, 2026).

About: Skillsoft Corp. provides corporate digital learning services in the United States and internationally. The company operates through Content, Global Knowledge, and SumTotal segments. It offers enterprise learning solutions to prepare organizations for the future of work, as well as enable them to overcome critical skill gaps, drive demonstrable behavior-change, and unlock the potential in their greatest assets.

item.description:

Ford closed the disposition of its BlueOval SK joint venture interest, with subsidiary Ford Energy Battery acquiring the two Kentucky battery plants and assuming a $3.805B DOE loan at 4.814% interest. Ford's capital contribution obligation of up to $6.6B was terminated, and it was released from its guarantee under the SSA. The loan requires quarterly interest-only payments through Jan 2030, then principal and interest through July 2040.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · HCM
item.ns0:headline: Won NMPA approval for fruquintinib/sintilimab combo in RCC
item.description:
Won NMPA approval for fruquintinib/sintilimab combo in RCC

HUTCHMED and Innovent announced NMPA approval for ELUNATE (fruquintinib) plus TYVYT (sintilimab) for second-line advanced/metastatic renal cell carcinoma. The FRUSICA-2 study showed a 63% reduction in risk of progression or death (HR 0.373) and median PFS of 22.2 months vs 6.9 months for axitinib/everolimus. This is the 10th approved indication for sintilimab.

About: HUTCHMED (China) Limited discovers, develops, and commercializes targeted therapeutics and immunotherapies for cancer and immunological diseases in HongKong and internationally. It operates in Oncology/Immunology and Other Ventures segments. The company develops Savolitinib, an inhibitor for non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), papillary and renal cell carcinoma, colorectal cancer (CRC), and gastric cancer (GC); and Fruquintinib, an inhibitor for CRC, breast cancer, GC, endometrial cancer (EMC), …

As of March 2, 2022, it operated approximately 1,400 retail stores. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Reynoldsburg, Ohio.

item.ns0:headline: Converts PNA1/PNB1 shares & PNB1 ADSs to common at 1.1:1; Novo Mercado migration
item.description:
Converts PNA1/PNB1 shares & PNB1 ADSs to common at 1.1:1; Novo Mercado migration

Received B3 approval to migrate to Novo Mercado, requiring mandatory exchange of all class A1 and B1 preferred shares and B1 ADSs into common shares/ADSs at a ratio of 1.1 common per preferred. The last trading day for PNB1 ADSs on NYSE is June 5, 2026, with the exchange and credit of common shares/ADSs occurring around June 10, 2026. Fractional shares will be sold and proceeds distributed to holders.

About: AXIA Energia SA, through its subsidiaries, engages in the generation, transmission, and commercialization of electricity in Brazil. The company generates electricity through hydroelectric, thermoelectric, nuclear, wind, and solar plants. It also owns and operates 44 hydroelectric plants with a total capacity of 42,293.5 megawatt (MW); and 66,539.17 kilometers of transmission lines. AXIA Energia SA was formerly known as Centrais Elétricas Brasileiras S.A. - Eletrobrás.

The presentation details a family-led board, poor compensation practices, and a six-pillar value creation plan.

The company operates through four segments: Recreation Lending, Home Improvement Lending, Commercial Lending, and Medallion Lending. Limited entered into a subscription agreement to purchase 243,927,966 common shares of Wallbridge Mining at C$0.092 per share for total C$22,441,373, representing a 19.62% stake post-closing. The private placement is expected to close on or about May 22, 2026, subject to TSX approval. Agnico Eagle will also receive an investor rights agreement including board nomination rights if it maintains ownership thresholds.

About: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited engages in the exploration, development, and production of mineral properties in Canada, Mexico, and Finland. It operates through Northern Business and Southern Business segments. The company primarily produces and sells gold deposits, as well as explores for silver, zinc, and copper deposits. Its flagship property is the LaRonde mine located in the Abitibi region of northwestern Quebec, Canada.

item.description:

Entered into settlements with creditors ACM ($6M judgment) and Reimer (lawsuit). Under the ACM Letter Agreement, Zoomcar will pay $2.5M cash by October 31, 2026, and issue equity for the residual ~$3.5M. The Reimer Settlement provides for issuance of 39M shares subject to a Section 3(a)(10) fairness hearing on June 1, 2026. item.description:
Acquires Empower Semiconductor for $1.5B cash; close H2 2026

Announced a definitive agreement to acquire Empower Semiconductor, a provider of integrated voltage regulators and power management solutions, for $1.5 billion in cash. The transaction is expected to close in the second half of calendar year 2026, subject to customary closing conditions and HSR antitrust clearance. The acquisition expands ADI's power portfolio for AI data centers.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · GVH
item.ns0:headline: Acquires 70% of Loomi Entertainment for $70 cash
item.description:
Acquires 70% of Loomi Entertainment for $70 cash

Limited completed the acquisition of 70% of the equity interests of Loomi Entertainment Group Limited for a nominal consideration of US$70 in cash. The transaction closed on May 19, 2026. Following the close, Globavend owns 70% and Fuk Yan Tse (Sharon) owns 30%, and Ms. Tse was appointed CEO of Loomi Group.

About: Globavend Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary, provides integrated cross-border logistics services and air freight forwarding services in Hong Kong, Australia, and New Zealand. Its services include parcel consolidation, air freight forwarding, customs clearance, on-carriage parcel transportation, and delivery. It serves e-commerce merchants and operators of e-commerce platforms. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Perth, Australia.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · RIG
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Valaris for 15.235 Transocean shares per share; votes pending
item.description:
Acquires Valaris for 15.235 Transocean shares per share; votes pending

Announced a business combination to acquire Valaris Limited, with each Valaris share exchanged for 15.235 Transocean shares. The transaction is structured as a scheme of arrangement under Bermuda law and requires approval from both Transocean and Valaris shareholders at meetings scheduled for [•], 2026. Post-closing, Transocean shareholders will own approximately 53% and Valaris shareholders 47% of the combined company on a fully diluted basis.

About: Transocean Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides offshore contract drilling services for oil and gas wells worldwide. It contracts its mobile offshore drilling rigs, related equipment, and work crews to drill oil and gas wells. As of February 14, 2022, the company had partial ownership interests in and operated a fleet of 37 mobile offshore drilling units, including 27 ultra-deep water and 10 harsh environment floaters.

  • Counterparty: Valaris Limited
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-02-09

item.description:

The proposed holding company of Pioneer State Bank, announced that its mutual-to-stock conversion and related IPO are expected to close on May 21, 2026. The subscription offering was oversubscribed; the company will sell 1,719,250 shares at $10.00 per share. Common stock will be quoted on OTCQB under a symbol to be determined starting May 22, 2026.
